glosses.ja: 洋服ダンス; ワードローブ

translations.vi: Làm ơn mở tủ quần áo.
translations.ja: ワードローブを開けてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular of ouvrir; direct command to the addressee.
Common noun, feminine singular, preceded by elided definite article l' (from la); direct object of Ouvre.
Conjunction si with elision before il (si il → s'il), introducing the conditional element in the politeness formula s'il te plaît.
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, indirect object (to you) with plaire in the fixed polite expression.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of plaire; impersonal subject is il (from s'il) in the expression.

sentences.target: Je range les serviettes dans l'armoire.

translations.fr: Je range les serviettes dans l'armoire.
translations.en: I'm putting the towels in the wardrobe.
translations.es: Estoy guardando las toallas en el armario.
translations.de: Ich lege die Handtücher in den Kleiderschrank.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把毛巾放进衣柜。
translations.pt: Estou colocando as toalhas no guarda-roupa.
translations.he: אני שם את המגבות בארון הבגדים.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cất khăn tắm vào tủ quần áo.
translations.nl: Ik leg de handdoeken in de kledingkast.
translations.hi: मैं तौलिये अलमारी में रख रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang meletakkan handuk di lemari pakaian.
translations.ja: タオルをワードローブに入れています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of ranger; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite article, plural; determines serviettes.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of range.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Common noun, feminine singular, with elided definite article l' (from la); object of the preposition dans.

sentences.target: On achète une armoire pour la chambre.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ aʃɛt yn aʁ.mwaʁ puʁ la ʃɑ̃bʁ/

translations.fr: On achète une armoire pour la chambre.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ aʃɛt yn aʁ.mwaʁ puʁ la ʃɑ̃bʁ/
translations.en: We're buying a wardrobe for the bedroom.
translations.es: Estamos comprando un armario para el dormitorio.
translations.de: Wir kaufen einen Kleiderschrank fürs Schlafzimmer.
translations.it: Stiamo comprando un armadio per la camera da letto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要为卧室买一个衣柜。
translations.yue: 我哋買個睡房用嘅衣櫃。
translations.pt: Estamos comprando um guarda-roupa para o quarto.
translations.he: אנחנו קונים ארון בגדים לחדר השינה.
translations.tr: Yatak odası için bir dolap alıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang mua một cái tủ quần áo cho phòng ngủ.
translations.ar: نحن نشتري خزانة ملابس لغرفة النوم.
translations.nl: We kopen een kledingkast voor de slaapkamer.
translations.hi: हम बेडरूम के लिए एक अलमारी खरीद रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αγοράζουμε μια ντουλάπα για το υπνοδωμάτιο.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper et klesskap til soverommet.
translations.id: Kami sedang membeli lemari pakaian untuk kamar tidur.
translations.sv: Vi köper en garderob till sovrummet.
translations.da: Vi køber et klædeskab til soveværelset.
translations.ja: 寝室用にワードローブを買っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/indefinite subject pronoun, often used colloquially for we; 3rd person singular agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of acheter; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines armoire.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of achète.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines chambre.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition pour.

sentences.target: Mon armoire est collée contre le mur.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ aʁ.mwaʁ ɛ kɔ.le kɔ̃tʁ lə myʁ/

translations.fr: Mon armoire est collée contre le mur.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ aʁ.mwaʁ ɛ kɔ.le kɔ̃tʁ lə myʁ/
translations.en: My wardrobe is right against the wall.
translations.es: Mi armario está pegado a la pared.
translations.de: Mein Kleiderschrank steht direkt an der Wand.
translations.it: Il mio armadio è addossato al muro.
translations.ko: 내 옷장이 벽에 딱 붙어 있어요.
translations.ru: Мой шкаф стоит вплотную к стене.
translations.pt: Meu guarda-roupa fica encostado na parede.
translations.vi: Tủ quần áo của tôi đặt sát tường.
translations.nl: Mijn kledingkast staat vlak tegen de muur.
translations.uk: Моя шафа стоїть впритул до стіни.
translations.hu: A ruhásszekrényem közvetlenül a falnál van.
translations.hi: मेरी अलमारी दीवार के बिलकुल पास है.
translations.pl: Moja szafa stoi tuż przy ścianie.
translations.el: Η ντουλάπα μου είναι κολλημένη στον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Klesskapet mitt står helt inntil veggen.
translations.id: Lemari pakaian saya menempel pada dinding.
translations.sv: Min garderob står tätt mot väggen.
translations.ro: Șifonierul meu este lipit de perete.
translations.cs: Moje skříň stojí těsně u zdi.
translations.da: Mit klædeskab står helt op ad væggen.
translations.ja: 私のワードローブは壁にぴったりくっついています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular form used before vowel-initial feminine noun for euphony; determines armoire.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary/copular verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Past participle of coller used as an adjective; agrees in gender and number (feminine singular) with armoire.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines mur.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition contre.
